sql_array: CREATE TABLE scripts (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, script_content VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO scripts (id, script_content) VALUES (1, 'Original Script');
INSERT INTO scripts (id, script_content) VALUES (2, 'Another Script');
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.copy_script((SELECT id FROM scripts WHERE script_content = 'Original Script') OR 2);
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.copy_script(NOT NULLIF((SELECT id FROM scripts WHERE id = 1), 1) OR 1);
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.copy_script((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scripts) OR 1);
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.copy_script((SELECT MAX(id) FROM scripts) OR (SELECT MIN(id) FROM scripts));
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.copy_script(COALESCE((SELECT id FROM scripts WHERE script_content LIKE 'Nonexistent%'), 0) OR 2);
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.copy_script(NULLIF((SELECT AVG(id) FROM scripts WHERE id < 3), 1) OR 3);
CREATE TABLE users (user_id INTEGER, username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.copy_script((SELECT u.user_id FROM users u LEFT JOIN scripts s ON u.user_id = s.id WHERE s.script_content IS NULL) OR 1);
ALTER TABLE scripts ADD COLUMN updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.copy_script((SELECT COUNT(s.id) FROM scripts s WHERE s.script_content IS NOT NULL) OR (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users));
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.copy_script((SELECT AVG(user_id) FROM users) OR 5);
